use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    input: String,
}

pub fn process_files() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    for entry in std::fs::read_dir(&cli.input).unwrap() {
        let path = entry.unwrap().path();
        let _ = std::fs::read_to_string(&path);
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    #[test]
    fn test_process() {
        Cli::try_parse_from(["test", "--input", "/tmp"]).unwrap();
    }
}
